details.test: Task 1: Register for a workshop (evening, <=90 min where available)
Task 2: Create personal schedule with 3 sessions across 2 days
Task 3: Register two people for cheapest paid tour under $25
Task 4: One-time $35 donation to Youth Solar Education fund
Task 5: Sign up for a Sunday morning volunteer shift (>=3 hours)
Task 6: Solar savings calculator - save estimate with constraints
Task 7: Add homeowners 2024 and renters 2022-2024 articles to reading list
Task 8: Request Friday morning field trip for 15 eighth graders
Task 9: Request map highlighting two local installer booths
